inputs.titre: Début de la construction de la Tour de Pise

reason: The image depicts the construction of a stone tower, presumed to be the Tower of Pisa. Laborers in rudimentary clothing are present, along with stonemason tools. However, the footwear of the mason appears anachronistic (modern shoes), and the tower itself seems too advanced for the initial construction phase, implying that the scene is showing an advanced stage of the construction and not the initial phase.
